flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Missouri State University-Springfield rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.5k → $18.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Missouri State University-Springfield fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
